title: Aperture Litewer's Portal Gun
description: Adds a fully functional Portal Gun to Minecraft with real portal physics, momentum mechanics, and puzzle-oriented gameplay.
body:
# 🌀 Aperture Litewer's Portal Gun
![portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7fa9174e1e2d3f781f343bbfbd5d8048910d2da.gif)


## A handheld Aperture Science portal device that brings real physics-based portals — even on the Moon — into Minecraft.

### 🌌 About the Mod

**What if Aperture Science miniaturized their portal technology for field testing?**

**Aperture Litewer's Portal Gun introduces a fully functional dual-portal device that lets you bend space, conserve momentum, and solve problems in ways Minecraft was never designed for.**

**Place two linked portals on walls, floors, ceilings — and even special lunar surfaces — and travel instantly while keeping your speed.**

### This isn’t teleportation.
## **This is real portal physics.**

![sun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d485f87520f2400126318c8e0b5cfb0a840fa924.gif)

##  ✨ Features

- 🌀 **Linked dual portals — enter one, exit the other**

- 🧠 **Momentum-based physics — speed in = speed out**

- 🌙 **Moon portal mechanic — special surfaces allow lunar portal placement**

- 🔫 **Craftable Portal Gun balanced for survival**

- 🧱 **Works on most solid blocks**

- 🎮 **Perfect for puzzle maps & adventure gameplay**

- 👥 **Multiplayer supported**
##  🌕Moon
**Stop? You really can place portals on the moon?!?!**

## YES!

#  🚀 Future Plans

- ### Portal-resistant blocks

- ### Aperture-style test chamber elements

- ### Energy pellet mechanics

- ### Portal interaction with redstone

- ### More advanced portal physics
##   ✅ Requirements

### To use this mod, you must install the following dependencies:
### 
[Immersive Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals/versions)

[Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

**Make sure they’re installed on the correct side (client/server) for your setup.**

###  🍋When life gives you lemons, don’t make lemonade — make life take the lemons back.
